config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because that is exactly how abuse and authoritarianism start. In my view, the role of society is to protect people and create fair rules, not to erase personal freedom whenever it is inconvenient. From my perspective, the best society is one that balances the common good with strong protections for each person.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis diutamakan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami justru menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi masyarakat” dipakai tanpa batas, hak minoritas dan kebebasan pribadi mudah sekali dikorbankan. Kepentingan umum memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai lewat aturan yang adil, bukan dengan menjadikan individu sebagai hal yang bisa disisihkan. Jadi, bagi saya, prioritasnya bukan masyarakat atau individu secara mutlak, melainkan perlindungan hak dasar sambil mengejar kebaikan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From an Indonesian perspective, I know how easily “for the public good” can become a justification for censorship, corruption, or pressure on people who are already weak, so I am very cautious about giving society a blank check. At the same time, I do not believe individual rights mean selfishness; rights and responsibilities should work together so public order, health, and fairness are protected without trampling personal freedom. For me, the better principle is that society should serve people, not absorb them.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diutamakan secara otomatis di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat sejarah kami penuh contoh ketika alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan diskriminasi, pembatasan kebebasan, dan penindasan minoritas, jadi saya tidak percaya pada cek kosong untuk masyarakat. Kepentingan umum memang penting, tetapi justru harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang kuat agar mayoritas tidak bisa semena-mena terhadap individu. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menyerap orang ke dalam kolektif, melainkan yang melindungi martabat dan kebebasan tiap orang sambil tetap mengejar kebaikan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the statement that society should take priority over the rights of the individual. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how the language of "public interest" can be used too easily to silence criticism, protect the powerful, or pressure ordinary people who have little room to defend themselves. Society does matter, but it should not become a blank excuse to override basic freedoms, because once individual rights are treated as optional, abuse becomes much easier. For me, the right balance is a society strong enough to maintain order and fairness, but limited enough to respect each person as a person, not just as part of a crowd.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tidak menerima gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara otomatis di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat betapa berbahayanya ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai sebagai alasan untuk membatasi kebebasan berbicara, membenarkan diskriminasi, atau menekan kelompok minoritas. Memang benar masyarakat butuh aturan, kesehatan publik, dan ketertiban, tetapi semua itu harus dibangun di atas hak dasar yang kuat, bukan dengan memperlakukan individu sebagai pengorbanan yang wajar. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru diukur dari seberapa baik ia melindungi martabat tiap orang, terutama ketika mayoritas merasa paling benar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
